description: Mexican criminal organization based in Michoacán, founded in the 1970s by Emilio Valencia Barragán. Dedicated to drug trafficking, particularly cocaine, to Mexico and the United States. Known for using avocado production as a front. Became one of the most violent and powerful cartels in Mexico, responsible for a third of US cocaine consumption. Disarticulated by 2009.

country_links.evidence_quote: se reveló los nexos de éste cártel con capos colombianos, como Fabio Ochoa
country_links.context: The cartel has links with Colombian drug lords, such as Fabio Ochoa, revealed during Operation Milenio.

country_links.evidence_quote: dedicada al tráfico ilegal de drogas y al envío de cocaína a México y Estados Unidos
country_links.context: The cartel sends cocaine to the United States and is responsible for introducing a third of all cocaine consumed there.
